economic_notes: GBEs: Sandy Lake Community Development Services Inc. and 1944299 Ontario Inc. accounted for on modified equity basis. Investments held in Sandy Lake Tank Farm Inc. notes: Fiscal year is 2020, not 2024. Province is Ontario based on auditor location (Winnipeg MB) but First Nation is in Ontario (references to Ontario Inc., Province of Ontario funding, Casino Rama). Two GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis: Sandy Lake Community Development Services Inc. and 1944299 Ontario Inc. Net debt position of $9,008,128. Incomplete projects liability of $10,625,481 represents deferred government funding for capital and other projects. Cash includes $10,625,481 internally restricted for incomplete projects. COVID-19 response costs of $31,150 noted. No schedule of remuneration included in provided text. Annual debt service reflects debt retirement per cash flow statement. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC + Province of Ontario + Health Canada + CMHC = 39,968,657 + 9,899,461 + 18,659,460 + 316,235 = 68,843,813. OSR = 73,989,140 - 68,843,813 = 5,145,327 (business enterprises net + other + net transfer adjustment).
